description: Discuss general aptitude, quantitative reasoning, logical deduction, etc.
Discuss calculus, linear algebra, probability, and complex variables.
Discuss set theory, graph theory, combinatorics, and logic.
Discuss pointers, memory management, arrays, and basics of C.
Discuss arrays, linked lists, trees, graphs, and hashing.
Discuss sorting, searching, greedy, divide and conquer, dynamic programming etc.
Discuss deadlocks, scheduling, memory management etc.
Discuss automata, regular expressions, context-free grammars, and Turing machines.
Discuss OSI model, TCP/IP, routing, subnetting etc.
Discuss instruction pipelines, memory hierarchy, cache, and microprocessors.
Discuss lexical analysis, parsing, syntax translation, and optimization.
Discuss Boolean algebra, combinational and sequential circuits, and logic gates.
Discuss normalization, SQL, transactions, indexing etc.
